headline: Australia Extends Crypto License Reprieve 6 Months

article.title: Australian regulator extends no-action period for crypto licensing
article.summary: Australia’s financial regulator extended temporary enforcement relief for digital asset businesses until Sept. 30 as firms transition into the country’s licensing system.

headline: AscendEX Faces $50M Withdrawal Backlog Amid Reserve Concerns

headline: US Goods Deficit Surges to $93.2 Billion

article.title: US Goods Trade Deficit Widens to Biggest in More Than a Year
article.summary: The US merchandise-trade deficit widened in May to the biggest in more than a year as exports fell and imports rose.

article.title: Nigeria Draws First Tranche of $5 Billion Swap With UAE Bank
article.summary: Nigeria has accessed the first tranche of a $5 billion derivatives deal with United Arab Emirates’ largest lender, pressing ahead with a transaction that has been scrutinized for being opaque.
